item.title: A Teen Romance Took A Dark And Tragic Turn
item.description: Rose Larner's life was cut short after a teenage relationship spiraled into violence. The heartbreaking case drew widespread attention and highlighted the dangers of possessiveness, control, and escalating conflict among young couples.

media:content.media:title: A Teen Romance Took A Dark And Tragic Turn
media:content.media:description: Rose Larner's life was cut short after a teenage relationship spiraled into violence. The heartbreaking case drew widespread attention and highlighted the dangers of possessiveness, control, and escalating conflict among young couples.

item.title: The Missing Woman Mystery That Turned Out To Be A Lie
item.description: When Carlee Russell vanished after calling 911 to report a toddler walking along an Alabama interstate, the story captured national attention. But after a massive search and days of speculation, investigators concluded the kidnapping never happened, transforming the case into one of the most infamous disappearance hoaxes in recent memory.

media:content.media:title: The Missing Woman Mystery That Turned Out To Be A Lie
media:content.media:description: When Carlee Russell vanished after calling 911 to report a toddler walking along an Alabama interstate, the story captured national attention. But after a massive search and days of speculation, investigators concluded the kidnapping never happened, transforming the case into one of the most infamous disappearance hoaxes in recent memory.

item.title: A Trusted Counselor Crossed Every Line
item.description: Jodi Hildebrandt built a reputation as a counselor and relationship expert, but former clients later accused her of manipulation and emotional harm. Her involvement in a high profile abuse case brought intense scrutiny to her methods and the influence she held over those around her.

media:content.media:title: A Trusted Counselor Crossed Every Line
media:content.media:description: Jodi Hildebrandt built a reputation as a counselor and relationship expert, but former clients later accused her of manipulation and emotional harm. Her involvement in a high profile abuse case brought intense scrutiny to her methods and the influence she held over those around her.

item.title: He Fled Across A Continent Then Ended Up Dead
item.description: Blair Adams appeared terrified in the days before his death, abruptly leaving Canada and traveling thousands of miles to Tennessee. When he was found dead under bizarre circumstances, investigators were left trying to determine who he was running from and why.

media:content.media:title: He Fled Across A Continent Then Ended Up Dead
media:content.media:description: Blair Adams appeared terrified in the days before his death, abruptly leaving Canada and traveling thousands of miles to Tennessee. When he was found dead under bizarre circumstances, investigators were left trying to determine who he was running from and why.

item.title: The Zodiac Killer's Identity Remains One Of History's Biggest Mysteries
item.description: More than five decades after a series of murders terrorized Northern California, the Zodiac Killer has never been officially identified. Cryptic letters, coded messages, and countless suspects have kept the case alive, making it one of the most famous unsolved mysteries in true crime history.

media:content.media:title: The Zodiac Killer's Identity Remains One Of History's Biggest Mysteries
media:content.media:description: More than five decades after a series of murders terrorized Northern California, the Zodiac Killer has never been officially identified. Cryptic letters, coded messages, and countless suspects have kept the case alive, making it one of the most famous unsolved mysteries in true crime history.

item.title: Russian Mob Or Vampires The Mystery Of Susan Walsh
item.description: Susan Walsh was a journalist investigating alleged Russian mob activity and New York's underground vampire subculture when she vanished without a trace in 1996. Nearly three decades later, her disappearance remains unsolved, fueling theories that range from organized crime to dangers much closer to home.

media:content.media:title: Russian Mob Or Vampires The Mystery Of Susan Walsh
media:content.media:description: Susan Walsh was a journalist investigating alleged Russian mob activity and New York's underground vampire subculture when she vanished without a trace in 1996. Nearly three decades later, her disappearance remains unsolved, fueling theories that range from organized crime to dangers much closer to home.
